content: The 2018 Nobel Prize in Chemistry was awarded jointly to Frances H. Arnold, George P. Smith, and Sir Gregory P. Winter for their work on the directed evolution of enzymes and phage display of peptides and antibodies. Arnold was recognized for her pioneering work in enzyme evolution, while Smith and Winter were honored for their development of methods for creating new proteins.
